name: Sunplus Technology Company Limited
summary: Sunplus Technology Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, researches, develops, designs, tests, and sells consumer integrated circuits (ICs) for multimedia audio/video, single-chip microcontrollers, and digital signal processors primarily in the Asia, Taiwan, and internationally. The company provides media player ICs for DVD player and portable DVD player; audio ICs for karoke, soundbar, and boom box, as well as party and DJ speaker; automotive ICs for application in infotainment, driver assistance, and display audio; and ultra-low power ECG sensor AFE IC, a wearable solutions for measuring electrocardiogram. It also offers Internet protocol (IP) solutions, such as high-speed I/O IP, high performance data conversion IP (ADC/DAC/AFE), and analog IP development for application in consumer, portable, and connected devices; and PLUS1 series ICs for industrial control, smart devices, smart vision, voice recognition, maker market, and high computing power demand applications. In addition, the company engages in management consulting; investments, system integration, market research survey, and information management and education services, as well as developing, manufacturing, and selling of computer software. Further, it is involved in building rental and property management activities. Sunplus Technology Company Limited was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Hsinchu, Taiwan.
